posts.author: nithin_kumrr
posts.text: Sensibull option chain VS kite option chain VS NSE OPTION chain — Hi @Amey1 , Sensibull OC shows PCR based on the strike range you have selected, not the entire chain. So if you have it set to ATM plus or minus 5 or 10 strikes, it only calculates PCR from those strikes, which gives you a different number than Kite or NSE. NSE shows change in OI in number of contracts. One needs to multiple by lot size 65. So PE: 35627 x 65: 2315755, CE: 59118 x 65: 3842670. Comparing this with Sensibull. They are rounding off. Kite - needs clarify. Again, PE: 83156 x 65: 5405140, CE: 64524 x 65: 4194060. Same…

posts.author: Amey1
posts.text: Sensibull option chain VS kite option chain VS NSE OPTION chain — Nifty closed at 23897.95 Overall PCR - Sensibull OC shows PCR 0.7(overall PCR) same in OI & OC screen, Kite OC shows 0.67, NSE OC manually calculated ATM PCR gets 0.67 ATM Chg in OI - NSE Put = 35627, Call = 59118, KITE - Put = 24.77, Call = 38.74, Sensibull - Put 23.2, Call - 38.4 Total ATM OI - NSE - Put - 83156, Call - 64524, Kite - Put - 55.66,Call 42.25, Sensibull - Put 54.1, Call 41.9 Now similarly ATM PCR will be different in those. kite OC Shows Max pain, whereas Sensibull don’t show max pain nor NSE sensibull OC ATM OI…
